mapper.insert: INSERT INTO patient (dept_id, patient_name, gender, admission_no, bed_number, admission_date, discharge_date, status) VALUES (#{deptId}, #{patientName}, #{gender}, #{admissionNo}, #{bedNumber}, #{admissionDate}, #{dischargeDate}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE patient SET dept_id = #{deptId}, patient_name = #{patientName}, gender = #{gender}, admission_no = #{admissionNo}, bed_number = #{bedNumber}, admission_date = #{admissionDate}, discharge_date = #{dischargeDate}, status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, dept_id, patient_name, gender, admission_no, bed_number, admission_date, discharge_date, status, created_at, updated_at FROM patient WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, dept_id, patient_name, gender, admission_no, bed_number, admission_date, discharge_date, status, created_at, updated_at FROM patient ORDER BY id

SELECT p.id AS patientId, p.patient_name AS patientName, p.gender AS gender, p.admission_no AS admissionNo, p.bed_number AS bedNumber, p.dept_id AS deptId, d.dept_name AS deptName, d.contact_phone AS deptContactPhone, d.location AS deptLocation, p.admission_date AS admissionDate, p.discharge_date AS dischargeDate, p.status AS status FROM patient p JOIN hospital_department d ON d.id = p.dept_id WHERE p.id = #{patientId}
